notes: C3711 Lead: Workers idle with 6 open Bolt tasks. Setting force_next=bolt to dispatch. PRIORITY QUEUE: (1) #287 /account/profile edit + wishlist link + email prefs (customer portal foundation shipped, this completes Phase 2 — dashboard cards link to placeholders that need real pages), (2) #290 GDPR export + audit log (legal compliance), (3) #289 admin-side customer mgmt. Bug #280 in_progress (local cleanup done, prod Turso blocked on bectly S3 creds), #281 defects bug, #282 size-filter duplicate — batch when Bolt reaches them. Trace: verify shipped customer portal auth/login/dashboard/orders/reorder flow end-to-end — check NextAuth session persistence, post-checkout account offer, email prefs DB wiring once #287 lands. Sage: mobile screenshots /account/* (dashboard, orders, order detail) — report visual issues as BOLT tasks. cz-competitors monitor: 23rd consecutive no-new-CZ-competitor scan done. 11 days to April 28 Vinted T&C campaign send. PRIOR: C3697 filter redesign tasks still open (#283 sidebar accordion, #284 PDP polish) — queued after customer portal completes. Bectly blockers unchanged: R2 keys, GA4, Heureka, GMC April 30, RESEND_API_KEY.
_prior_notes: C3697 Lead (bectly directive): 2 major UX tasks created per research. #283 BOLT Filter redesign — convert desktop 4-col dump to left sidebar accordion (Velikost/Barva open by default, Značka/Stav collapsed), hide zero-count options, fix category-aware size groups (closes bugs #280+#282). #284 BOLT PDP polish — title typography (text-balance, max-w-28ch, font-semibold not bold, responsive scale), hide size picker for non-clothing/Jiná sentinel, move Jediný kus badge above ATC, parse description for bullet lists, add 'Velikost kusu' disambiguation helper. Both tasks have detailed specs with file:line refs, acceptance criteria, reference URLs from Baymard/commerce-ui PDP study. force_next=bolt. Follow-on: Trace visual QA after each commit. PRIOR: C3633 Lead: Acked [1911, 1872]. Bolt backlog empty after #256 (campaign lock) + #257 (coverage dashboard) landed. 11 days to April 28 17:00 CET Vinted campaign. Added #258 BOLT (dry-run preview + typed-confirm gate on VintedCampaignButton — safety UX, read-only server action) and #259 TRACE (E2E audit of full send path: double-click, concurrent serverless, rate-limit, unsubscribe filter, Resend error path lock retention). Unpaused bolt+trace+sage, force_next=bolt. Bectly blockers still: RESEND_API_KEY + UNSUBSCRIBE_HMAC_SECRET on Vercel (campaign silent-fails without them), R2 keys, GA4 ID, Heureka, GMC April 30. PRIOR: C3557 Lead: #238 PDP display + #239 pre-campaign audit BOTH DONE. Acked feedback [1833, 1829, 1825]. Turso measurement backfill was flagged as prod gap (0/354 vs dev 255/354) — solving via admin UI instead of terminal: new Task #240 BOLT (admin button to run extractor against live Prisma, no env vars needed) + #241 BOLT (admin dashboard coverage panel — measurements/defects/images/video stats with deep-links to missing-X filters). Unpauses Bolt/Trace/Sage, force_next=bolt. 11 days to April 28 17:00 CET campaign. Remaining bectly blockers: RESEND_API_KEY on Vercel (campaign will silently fail), UNSUBSCRIBE_HMAC_SECRET, R2 keys, GA4 ID, Heureka API key, GMC registration (April 30 Doppl VTO deadline).

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit or until_lead_directive)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
